markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and resolve contract issues for GrowthX services with N-able Technologies.](https://fathom.video/share/YuRibyC3sgqRmGzRxw8MUtFRfPNrsMe-?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Contract negotiations are facing delays due to new procurement processes at N-able](https://fathom.video/share/YuRibyC3sgqRmGzRxw8MUtFRfPNrsMe-?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [Kickoff date pushed to September 22nd to allow time for contract finalization](https://fathom.video/share/YuRibyC3sgqRmGzRxw8MUtFRfPNrsMe-?tab=summary&timestamp=1303.0)
  - [Key issues: payment terms, deliverable specifics, and termination clause](https://fathom.video/share/YuRibyC3sgqRmGzRxw8MUtFRfPNrsMe-?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
  - [N-able procurement seeking more clarity on deliverables and payment structure](https://fathom.video/share/YuRibyC3sgqRmGzRxw8MUtFRfPNrsMe-?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

## Topics

### Contract Status and Challenges

  - [New procurement lead (Joe) at N-able causing delays and additional scrutiny](https://fathom.video/share/YuRibyC3sgqRmGzRxw8MUtFRfPNrsMe-?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
  - [Legal team (Shelly DeWild) made some additions to sections 1.3, 3.5.2, and 9.2](https://fathom.video/share/YuRibyC3sgqRmGzRxw8MUtFRfPNrsMe-?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Procurement wants validation of deliverables before payment](https://fathom.video/share/YuRibyC3sgqRmGzRxw8MUtFRfPNrsMe-?tab=summary&timestamp=444.0)
  - [Andrew frustrated with the lengthy approval process](https://fathom.video/share/YuRibyC3sgqRmGzRxw8MUtFRfPNrsMe-?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)

### Payment Terms and Deliverables

  - [Current proposal: Quarterly billing in advance, net 60 payment terms](https://fathom.video/share/YuRibyC3sgqRmGzRxw8MUtFRfPNrsMe-?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
  - [Procurement (Joe) requesting more specificity on deliverables](https://fathom.video/share/YuRibyC3sgqRmGzRxw8MUtFRfPNrsMe-?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [GrowthX proposing 5+ pieces of content per week (20+ per month)](https://fathom.video/share/YuRibyC3sgqRmGzRxw8MUtFRfPNrsMe-?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)
  - [Andrew suggested possible compromise: "half upfront, half on delivery" structure](https://fathom.video/share/YuRibyC3sgqRmGzRxw8MUtFRfPNrsMe-?tab=summary&timestamp=1924.0)

### Termination Clause

  - [GrowthX requested removal of "termination for convenience" clause](https://fathom.video/share/YuRibyC3sgqRmGzRxw8MUtFRfPNrsMe-?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
  - [N-able legal team appears to have accepted this change](https://fathom.video/share/YuRibyC3sgqRmGzRxw8MUtFRfPNrsMe-?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)

### Kickoff Date

  - [Originally aiming for September 15th](https://fathom.video/share/YuRibyC3sgqRmGzRxw8MUtFRfPNrsMe-?tab=summary&timestamp=1288.0)
  - [Pushed to September 22nd due to contract finalization timeline](https://fathom.video/share/YuRibyC3sgqRmGzRxw8MUtFRfPNrsMe-?tab=summary&timestamp=1303.0)
  - [Concerns about routing for signature, especially with key signer in Europe](https://fathom.video/share/YuRibyC3sgqRmGzRxw8MUtFRfPNrsMe-?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)

### N-able's Internal Processes

  - [New procurement lead implementing stricter review processes](https://fathom.video/share/YuRibyC3sgqRmGzRxw8MUtFRfPNrsMe-?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
  - [Multiple stakeholders involved (Andrew, Nick, Shelly, Joe, Sara Sharp)](https://fathom.video/share/YuRibyC3sgqRmGzRxw8MUtFRfPNrsMe-?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)
  - [Using DocuSign for final contract execution](https://fathom.video/share/YuRibyC3sgqRmGzRxw8MUtFRfPNrsMe-?tab=summary&timestamp=891.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to review latest comments from Shelly and Joe](https://fathom.video/share/YuRibyC3sgqRmGzRxw8MUtFRfPNrsMe-?tab=summary&timestamp=1170.0)
  - [GrowthX to send updated contract draft by Monday morning](https://fathom.video/share/YuRibyC3sgqRmGzRxw8MUtFRfPNrsMe-?tab=summary&timestamp=1029.0)
  - [Andrew to follow up internally on remaining procurement concerns](https://fathom.video/share/YuRibyC3sgqRmGzRxw8MUtFRfPNrsMe-?tab=summary&timestamp=1343.0)
  - [Both parties to aim for contract finalization before September 22nd kickoff](https://fathom.video/share/YuRibyC3sgqRmGzRxw8MUtFRfPNrsMe-?tab=summary&timestamp=2000.0)
  - [GrowthX to update PandaDoc with Sara Sharp as the signer](https://fathom.video/share/YuRibyC3sgqRmGzRxw8MUtFRfPNrsMe-?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
  - [N-able to use DocuSign for final contract execution once language is agreed upon](https://fathom.video/share/YuRibyC3sgqRmGzRxw8MUtFRfPNrsMe-?tab=summary&timestamp=1023.0)
